outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW: Positive GEX across all expiries suppresses volatility. Spot pinned at gamma flip resonance creates compression - expect breakout on volume surge.
outlook.summary: Price is EXACTLY at the Gamma Flip RESONANCE zone (634.0-634.37) across ALL three expiries. This is a rare structural alignment. Positive GEX (1.89B total) indicates dealers are long gamma and will suppress volatility, pinning price near this level. Reverse smirk skew confirms bullish bias but extreme PCR in weekly/monthly (2.14-3.60) suggests heavy hedging. Key decision point: break above 635 targets 645 max pain; break below 630 support accelerates toward 615.
